description:
As the UK's leading cycling and motoring retailer, Halfords is your one-stop shop for exclusive brands across bikes, high quality car parts and motoring accessories, as well as camping and travel equipment. We’re committed to never being beaten on price on 1000s of motoring essentials, so when you shop with Halfords, you know you’re getting fantastic value. 

Browse our latest collection of men's and women's mountain, road, and hybrid bikes with options to suit all budgets. We also stock a wide range of cycle clothing to help keep you comfortable on your cycling adventures whatever the season. 

We pride ourselves in offering the highest quality motoring products to ensure you’re always road ready. Our friendly experts are on hand to fit car batteries, wiper blades, car bulbs and more to help make life easier. 

If you are planning a getaway, then discover our wide range of camping and travel accessories from roof boxes to air beds to ensure you’re fully prepared for your adventure.

You can also save money across our motoring products and services with the Halfords Motoring Club. Simply sign up for free and instantly gain access to exclusive offers and discounts or upgrade to premium membership for even further savings.
title: Windscreen wiper fitted in record time
review: Like an idiot I left the automatic windscreen wiper on and in the frost it tried to wipe and tore off drivers side windscreen wiper rubber. Popped into Halfords at Wellingborough and Bradley was really helpful. Making sure I had the correct blade and fitting it in record time. Must remember to turn off automatic windscreen wipers.

title: Halfords Livingston going above and beyond…
review: I’m not one for leaving reviews but after my visit to Halfords in Livingston and the service I received it feels like the right thing to do. Mikey in the Livingston branch went above and beyond of what would be described as general/good customer service. Not only did he help me find the correct bulb for my car, but he also took it out the car to fit it whilst I waited to pay because I had my two young children with me. He was very knowledgeable when I first asked him about what I needed and then knocked it out the park with the service he provided afterwards, I couldn’t thank him enough for making what could have been a stressful experience a breeze. Every Halfords needs Mikey!

title: Just took my correro e bike to Halfords…
review: Just took my correro e bike to Halfords in Coventry for two new tyres and two new innertubes. Just turned up didn't book. Lee from Halfords was excellent he replaced the tyres and innertubes and altered the the kick stand for me while I waited gave great advice. Took very little time to complete and I was able to carry on my journey. Brilliant service would fully recommend thanks again Lee excellent customer service skills.

title: Great service
review: The driver's side headlight went out on my old Golf just after Boxing Day. I went to the Halfords at North Farm Estate, Tunbridge Wells, Kent and they were open. I was served by a chap called Lewis who was polite, chatty, friendly and quickly changed the bulb for me. I opted to get the other light replaced at the same time because they were previously both fitted at the same time. I was impressed with both the speed and efficiency of the service I received. When I paid, Lewis explained various store promotions and was informative without being at all pushy, which is always nice. All round great service and glad to have a significant problem fixed quickly.

title: First class customer service
review: We had ordered a new front number plate to be fitted at the Kilmarnock store. We received a call from one of their team members shortly before we set off to the store to let us know that their machine had unfortunately broken down and they'd not be able to print/fit one for us. They did manage to rearrange things at their Greenock store (custom house quay), so we drove up there instead. Thomas, the staff member that dealt with us, could not have been more helpful as the fitting of the new plate wasn't as straightforward as most. He (along with one of his colleagues) also helped with a front indicator issue we had developed. They could not have been more pleasant, helpful, efficient and a fantastic demonstration of 1st class customer service. Thanks again guys.

title: Absolutely blown away by Halfords…
review: Absolutely blown away by Halfords Horsham. Went in for a simple bulb fix, completed with no fuss, went to close the bonnet and the latch had completely locked up. Common with VWs unfortunately. The guys tried everything there and then to fix it but couldn't.I was then told they could get the part in the next day, fixed and back with me. Great, but that's not the end.I then get a call in the morning. "Good news, when we pulled out the latch we realised it could be fixed so they just went and did it". Saved me £100! It would have been so easy to replace the unit and charge me the full price. Guess where I'm now going for my next service and MOT?!

title: Single tyre supplement is wrong
review: Car was stuck at home after being recovered with a unrepairable tyre. Could only use a mobile tyre fitter. Needed only 1 tyre and was charged £25 extra supplement for the pleasure. Then the tyre was more expensive than a competitor, emailed the link at the bottom of the order confirmation to see if i could get a price match and got a auto response of “this mailbox is no longer monitored, please use live chat on halfords website”. Why do you have an email questions contact on your order confirmation if its not monitored anymore?Updated to a 4 star as the service by the fitter is good. You need to remove the supplement for single tyre fitting though.

title: 10 point health check at Wellingborough store
review: My friend recommended I go to the Wellingborough Branch and get a free 10 point health check which sounded too good to be true, almost but not quite.A very friendly and knowledgeable chap called Adnan (who gets 5*) carried out the check and identified two tyres needed inflating but all met the required tread depth, two bulbs were out at the back which I had to go back in-store to purchase, return to get the right bulbs as I’d been given the wrong ones,  and then return again to get some coolant which the in-store guys never got the message from Adnan to supply me with. However, I’m back in the road legal and safe. The only negative I would say apart from dancing in and out of the store was the £10 per bulb to change them which I thought was a tad excessive but apart from that I’d definitely recommend the service to family and friends but be aware free is not necessarily as cheap as it might be.

The only reason I have marked them down is because I wasn't expecting to be charged £9 just to change a bulb, even under the circumstances I mentioned.

title: Bike Repair was Easy
review: Bike Repair was Easy. I was collecting some online orders (antifreeze etc) and took a Halfords bought bike in for repair, just within 12 months of purchase. They replaced the brake lever and waived any cost. Unfortunately I could not call the store direct and the central call centre could not find repair status, but when I drove there it was ready.... Almost perfect?

title: Car battery change
review: I booked in for a car battery change and was seen exactly on time. The technician needed to check a couple of things with a colleague but this was done swiftly. Polite and helpful staff and a positive experience.The only reason for the 4 stars is because I felt the staff should have perhaps had a better shelter with 3 sides to protect from poor weather and also because they were moving heavy batteries and did not appear to be wearing safety footwear. I think Halfords should review these things.

title: Great service in Watford
review: The team in Watford were excellent but I had problems with their website and online help. I bought a roof rack from Watford and wanted it fitted by Halfords. When I went to the store the item was there for collection but there was no record of me booking in the item for fitting. Indeed, it was very difficult to make arrangements for the fitting - I had to order a free 5 point check and then persuade them to fit it. The local team were brilliant but I was lucky they were so good and flexible. They did not finish it until after 6pm.

title: I am disabled and bought a new bike for…
review: I am disabled and bought a new bike for £1100 in October.. I saved a year to buy the bike..I’ve not been over 400 miles and I’ve had a replacement battery which I waited a week for..I’ve not been able to use the bike because the motor has since stopped functioning..The shop has said it will be after the new year until it gets fixed..The shop has been very helpful and it isn’t their fault but it means I’m still stuck.. I’m not happy but what is going on..it was a brand new bike…

title: I purchased a 4 ton Halfords Bottle…
review: I purchased a 4 ton Halfords Bottle jack in September, 2024, and after the second time in using this, it would not function. I contacted the service helpline - Monday 23rd December - I was advised to return the item to the Halfords store in Loanhead. On Friday 27th December, the staff examined the jack, and they could not get it to function. No problem whatsoever in obtaining a new one - the staff were great and helpful. However, in front of the staff, I opened the box - which was bashed and sellotaped up, the jack was upside down, and the instruction manual had been taken out of the plastic bag - including chips on the base of the jack. This obviously did not leave the suppliers in this condition, but time will tell if this item had been returned, or had been used at some point - photos supplied. I would have given 5 stars, but for the condition of the jack, and it is a 4 hour return journey using public transport from Galashiels.

title: I bought a bike for my sons birthday…
review: I bought a bike for my sons birthday last week, I paid fitting the bike and delivery costs due to health issues and not being able to collect it and build it myself. The bike arrived with no pedals on, or handle bars, which I had “build” myself. So what was the build cost fee about?? I did have an issue with the bike and it took a lot of stress to resolve the issue, the ability to complain when something falls below standard is important. And this was made very tough. It was eventually resolved …. When I left a review. But the bike product itself is great.

title: Wiper blade not the correct fitment.
review: Bought a rear wiper blade.  Basically the correct one, but not quite.  The central mounting pin should have been 6mm diameter, the new one was about 2mm diameter. Probably an attempt to make blades common to several vehicles. There was risk the blade would have fallen off.  I made a spacer bush to go over the small pin. Arrived quickly though !

title: Husband wanted an e bike and other…
review: Husband wanted an e bike and other companies we went to were much more expensive and more than he wanted to pay so found one he really liked on Halfords website which was also on sale. Booked a slot to pick up e bike and also the extras we paid extra for. Had a text the day before to say the technician had built the bike. Went to collect the next day only to find it wasn't completed and had issues which Scott and Matt then had to deal with. Numerous issues which Haydn should've picked up on and double checked. So we ended up spending another 2 hours just to rectify the issues not addressed earlier.Hopefully hubby will have no further issues with the e bike and we won't need to go back.

title: Halfords 1/2/3 Isofix Child Seat Top Tether
review: Delivered promptly. Initially very pleased, 2 seats (Twins) Grand children. Disappointed that no instruction leaflet provided. Regarding on-seat safety labelling, appears to be missing on headrest removal security key. Also, the function of the presumed car seat belt tension device is a bit of a mystery, should it be necessary to fit seats to a non isofix vehicle. Final point, the seat design of my vehicle, benefits from the use of Isofix locator guides (often supplied with other isofix child seats). These did not appear to be listed on Halfords car safety website pages (Ordered from Amazon).The price was excellent and overall pleased with purchase.

title: The engineer arrived unprepared for the vehicle
review: The Halfords' engineer arrived to fit a new battery in our car at our home.  His tool kit was missing a lot of tools, so he wasn't sure he could carry out the installation but did manage to, although his service was the bare minimum. The on-line booking had detailed our vehicle so we would hope the engineer would arrive prepared. Sadly we had no confidence in his knowledge and would not use Halfords again.

Quite often I need to book an appointment time and that seems impossible if done through the 'Support Team'. Can we go back to the way we used to contact the store-by a SIMPLE telephone call to the store?

title: Poor service incorrect part
review: What went wrong.Having previously told me a van battery was not available when I went for "click & collect", then found one, then fitted it and put the cover back on upside down trapping a cable.I tried again on 2nd January.I ordered a side light bulb holder and bulb with fitting.Having entered my registration to confirm both fitted.On arriving at the same Chesterfield store as previously I was told by woman on desk and a fitter that they didn't/coildn't fit both, only the bulb.I asked them were they sure.They both repeated "no, only the bulb"I then said ... "If you don't , how are you going to fit the bulb, without removing the holder to do so, it is plug and play".They then checked and agreed with me.Fitter then tried to fit new bulb and new holder but holder thicker than original so wouldn't go into light body.He then fitted bulb in my original holder.Light worked.Refund issued for holder.My complaint is two.Why did I have to argue with your staff about fitting when all fitter needed to do was look at new bulb and bulb holder?Why did holder not fit despite me entering my registration and getting confirmation it did on line?Poor initial service at desk.Incorrect information online regarding product.Van = 2005 1.9 Vivaro

title: Very expensive
review: Received seasonal sale notification with 10% off if spent >£30. My car needs new wiper blades, front and back. Opted for Bosch: AR24U @ £21.49, AR13U @ £18.99, and H275 @£13.09. Searched same products @ Euro Parts, their prices are £13.99, £9.59 and £5.77 respectively. Clearly Halfords' mark-up pricing is shocking. Still a lot more expensive after discount. The company keeps dishing out discounts week in week out all year round but their business strategy and pricing is a no brainer.

title: Halfords - Peartree Rd - Colchester
review: Car seemed to have battery issues on a Sunday morning. Contacted Halfords and was notified of prices for a replacement. Took the car down and had the battery fitted within an hour or so (the weekend before Xmas).AT NO STAGE was I asked which battery option I'd opt for - they just went ahead and fitted the Most Expensive option - which tbh just demonstrated their corporate ethos of "Fleece the Customer for as much as you can while he's in your clutches" mentality.The guy was accommodating enough and I'm grateful that it was at least open on a Sunday which allowed me to address the problem that had arisen.  The automotive trade has a reputation for ripping people off - but from a Customer Care & Transparency angle they fell somewhat short of the standard I'd expect from a National Brand. Job No 266/9036429

title: Bought a bike for my son for Christmas
review: Have updated my review to include my customer number 2226171542. I'm not sure what this will help as my husband has attached the mud guards and lights. Bought a bike for my son for Christmas and some extra bits,mud guards and lights paid the charge for the bike to be put together,I think it was £30(maybe wrong).went to pick up the bike and was handed the extras,asked why they hadn't been fitted and were told it was going to cost us an extra £5 for these to be fitted. Paid enough for the bike and the fitting service as it was. Husband can fit the extras,it's not a big issue but I think it's very poor customer service. I work in retail and in the current climate keeping customers and making them happy is paramount. It's really poor customer service.

title: Customer service needs improvement/communication skills
review: I placed a small order for a company vehicle. With specific delivery instructions, the delivery failed by the third party courier. Halfords provide a "live chat" service but they seemed to be unable to rectify the solution on this channel, so created a case and explained someone would contact me later that day via email.4 working days later, someone responded via email - on a Friday evening (just before 7pm). 2 working days later, I asked for the product to be re-delivered, but Halfords explained it had already been refunded and need to order again.

We’re committed to never being beaten on price on 1000s of motoring essentials, so when you shop with Halfords, you know you’re getting fantastic value. 

Browse our latest collection of men's and women's mountain, road, and hybrid bikes with options to suit all budgets. We also stock a wide range of cycle clothing to help keep you comfortable on your cycling adventures whatever the season. 

We pride ourselves in offering the highest quality motoring products to ensure you’re always road ready. Our friendly experts are on hand to fit car batteries, wiper blades, car bulbs and more to help make life easier. 

If you are planning a getaway, then discover our wide range of camping and travel accessories from roof boxes to air beds to ensure you’re fully prepared for your adventure.

You can also save money across our motoring products and services with the Halfords Motoring Club. Simply sign up for free and instantly gain access to exclusive offers and discounts or upgrade to premium membership for even further savings.
title: Poor service
review: Visited the Christchurch Branch and yet again unable to change a headlight. We own a Kia so hardly an unknown make . Apparently it would mean removing the battery etc etc  Well....we went home , Googled it and changed it ourselves . It did not require the removal of the battery. .........Dear Halfords. Thanks for your reply but we were walk in customers so no order number. We purchased a bulb for a Kia Ceed at 11.55 hours . Hopefully you can trace it from this information.

title: Hi booked and paid on line  for a tyre…
review: Hi booked and paid on line  for a tyre replacement on 30/10/24 for next day , with some extra requirements .The Team worked extremely hard as maximum bookings evident from leaving car at garage . Tyre well fitted  I enquired re receipt for work where I was informed that email forwarding would certify this . I didn’t receive any email confirmation/ receipt of work  only numerous advertisements from Halfords . With online booking I inadvertently paid for some extra service which is already included with the standard tyre replacement charge . Hence I at present have no receipt nor proof of the extra unnecessary charges . I would appreciate if this can be reviewed.Thankyou .

title: Today I had a battery fitted by an…
review: Today I had a battery fitted by an Halford mobile fitter the reason I had it fitted at home was because I was told the battery needed programming to the car. When the fitter arrived he said it did not need programming. What I upset about is at the Halford store in Leigh they told me the type of battery had to be programmed so I paid extra to have it fitted at home and I feel ripped off I could have fitted it myself which is what was going to do. The order number wasA961B023718 and the order was made online. I first enquired at your Leigh store and that is were I was misinformed on Tuesday 26th November.

title: Left a bike for repair at Keighley…
review: Left a bike for repair at Keighley Retail early Monday 25th Nov. After a quick assessment by the girl who located a damaged gear cable it was duly booked in for repair No.8028176519.  A few minutes later I received a text thanking me for choosing Halfords, we'll let you know when we're done with a collection date of Wed 27th Nov. Great. However when I returned to collect the bike, it had not been repaired and was informed by a man that, we do not have mechanics on site Monday, Tuesday, or Wednesday ?? Why was I not informed of this initially and why was a text sent to say collection on Wednesday. After a brief discussion !! he said he would repair it today and give me a ring when ready. Its now 19.20 and no phone call. I'm absolutely disgusted with the lack of and incorrect information which resulted in me making an unnecessary car journey. Not good Halfords.  The number is in the original message !!

title: Annoying Pop-ups
review: I just visited your website to look for a new bike for my Grandson but I've given up. Every bike I look at gets covered by unbearably annoying pop-ups telling me how many people are looking at the bike and how many have bought it.      I don't give a monkeys about others. I'm only interested in the product. Get rid of these annoying pop-ups and let us just view the product.     As it is, I've now gone elsewhere for a bike, and guess what (No Pop-ups)

title: No record of major service
review: I booked and paid for an Mot and major service but Halfords can't seem to provide a record of the service report. I've been attempting to obtain this for almost a month. Each time I email, I get a generic response and told I'll get a response within 48 hours. Each time, no response. So as I'm getting tired of it, I've emailed over a formal complaint and requested a full refund, interestingly I've had radio silence. Maybe they hope this will disappear. I can see generic templated responses to bad reviews on trust pilot so I wonder which one I'll get by going public. Not to mention, a bulb was replaced as part of the MOT and it stopped working the next day. I can see this is just one bad experience of many. Here's the case reference 24700042 if anyone wants to bother replying. The next contact I'll make will be to the motor ombudsman Thanks for your automated reply. You will notice I already included my case reference in the original review29/11/24- still no response aside from the automated ones set up to make it look like they respond....12/12/24- obviously no one has 'reached out' even after a formal complaint was submitted

title: Check the online pricing before buying ANYTHING
review: Ok. So Halfords have to make money and face stiff competition. I get it online prices are cheaper but …. Leisure Careplan bike serviced. Charged £8.00 less 10% for brake pads when they are £2.99 online/click and collect. That’s one heck of a markup. In fairness when I went in the store they readily gave me a refund for the difference between the store and the online price.

title: 22nd November I booked an appointment…
review: 22nd November I booked an appointment for a repair. As it had just been serviced and had a few things that needed tuning.So booked it on 26th a day they had free. Got told I can come in afternoon. I go down today on 26th. To be told they can't repair today as there's 6 bikes in front. So why book me in? I think they didn't check for appointments and took walkings instead. Then said I can leave it there and might get done Friday. No good as I use it for work daily. I just don't get why I got to book an appointment if I can't even be seen that day?

title: Poor website/poor  customer services/too much hassle
review: Poor website, not easy to navigate/order things, sometimes not accessible, and poor customer services. No phone numbers for customer services - even for Premium Members- only Chat Bot. Annoying. Will cancel membership. Didn't expect this hassle!

title: Terrible Customer Service.
review: Bought 2 winter tyres from Halfords last night and used their payment assist to pay. Payment assist took the deposit and agreement was signed but no purchase confirmation from Halfords and products were still in my basket. I tried using the live chat and was put through to someone who kept on disconnecting. I then called customer service twice and both times the person who I spoke to disconnected as well. The tyres were meant to be fitted this morning due to the weather here at the moment and the areas I need to commute to! I will never buy anything from this company again and would advice the same to others. I certainly wouldn't put much trust in their customer care should something go wrong.

title: Negligent and dangerous
review: Terrible experience which damaged our car. Took car in to Cambridge branch for new battery and immediately after the warning lights in the car were going off and the auto stop / start was not working on the engine.Took it back and the ‘mechanic’ tried to digitally override the alert. The alert was still on and he said it would reset in a few days.It didn’t.Eventually more alerts came on and we took it to our local garage.Halfords had damaged an electrical cable in their botched work which cost c.£300 to fix.

title: Tyre change -need the car to be kept for the full day!
review: I recently booked a tyre fitting with Halfords online for 8:30 AM, expecting it to be a straightforward process. However, I was surprised to find out that they wanted me to leave my car with them for the entire day just for a tyre change!I called customer services to confirm, hoping there was some misunderstanding, but they assured me this was indeed their process. Frankly, this seems completely absurd. A tyre change is a relatively quick job and shouldn’t require holding a vehicle for the whole day.This level of inconvenience and inefficiency is disappointing and doesn’t inspire confidence in their service. A much more customer-friendly approach would be to offer a realistic and prompt time frame for such a basic service.

title: Goodbye Halfords, a terrible service from a terrible company
review: I purchased a dash cam forgetting to select "include fitting" from the website and picked it up. After realising I hadn't selected to have it fitted I used their "chat with an expert" to see about booking a slot to have it fitted by them. I was told "just take it to your local store and they will fit it there and then" not quite believing this, I called the support desk and was informed they couldn't fit it for another month. So I decided to fit the cam myself. I soon discovered that my purchase was faulty and took it back to the store to exchange for a like for like item, but was told "Brian needs to check it out to see if it really is faulty" but Brian wasn't available for another week. So I was left with a faulty item which was purchased for traveling this week. Halfords, you have a shockingly bad returns process and your experts are shit. I will obviously take my money elsewhere in future

title: I ordered tyres online and paid with…
review: I ordered tyres online and paid with PayPal. I needed them next day in order to work. They took the order, then immediately refunded the money, which takes days to get back to me. This left me with neither the money or the tyres. When I complained they said 'someone in the team will get back to you in the next 48hrs' despite me explaining I needed them next day! Awful customer service, it might be more expensive but use ATS instead.

title: Dash cam fitting by mobile technician
review: Dash cam fitting by mobile technician. Halfords booked to come and fit a dashcam at home today. Phoned at just after 8am to say they were not coming because of the snow. I would be expected to get to work in this but there you go. Technician couldn’t get off the phone quick enough as I wanted to book another appointment but he couldn’t wait for me to get my diary and told me to go online and book it. I can’t. The order is still live. Tried chat bot and it’s useless. Tried phoning, also useless. No option I can see to cancel. Absolutely rubbish. Just been cut off from hold as someone picked phone up then cut me off…nice!

review: Halfords have lost a loyal customer! I ordered 3 large plastic storage boxes with lids to be delivered 2 weeks ago. All arrived with damage, 2 particularly bad. Reported it immediately via live chat including photos of the damage as well as my cut hand from the unpackaging and state of them. Was told would be escalated to another team last week and they couldn't handle a replacement or a refund??? Was assured I'd hear within 48 hours... that came and went so I've chased via email 3 times and been ignored each time. Facebook messenger was attempted and been ignored on that since initial message also.See belowHalfords Customer Services: 25134166

title: Purchased a battery for our digger
review: Purchased a battery for our digger.  29-10-2023.  Was a like for like purchase as took original into the Wisbech store. Has 3 year guarantee written all over it.   Returned it 31-12-24   to be told warranty invalid. Yes I have the printed reciept! Gareth the so called manager put it on a machine! Then defaced my receipt writing warranty invalid all over it.   No written machine results given. No explanation, nothing.  Actually he was rude arrogant and uneducated,  clearly doesn't know the difference between guarantee and warranty,  as kept telling me was the same thing.   Legally it isn't!!!Anyway would appear I'm flogging an uneducated dead horse,  so will have to get intouch with trading standards and small claims court.   It's not the cost of the battery,   it's the fraud Halfords are committing.   After reading up it appears I'm not the first. Can't advertise a guarantee at point of sale and then not comply. That's fraud selling at its highest.... Case ref 25158785,   chatted with a chanajeet. 31-12-2024

title: Over 30 days for refund
review: Booked mobile tyre fitting on 6th December at a cost of over £180. On 7th Dec, date of fitting I received a call advising the appt would need to be cancelled. I asked for a refund rather than rebook, I was advised the refund would be 3 to 5 days. On checking my statement on 22nd December I noted, no refund had been processed and duly called. I was advised this was an error on their part and assured me the refund was now processed and would take 3 to 5 days. On the 31st December I received an email advising my refund has now been processed and will take 3 to 5 days. Over 1 month to process a refund of over £180, my advice is, DO NOT use this company.

title: poor website
review: Wanted new wiper blades for one year old VW Tiguan. Entered registration and model was confirmed  - very confusing website ordering but ordered for front and rear and paid. Free fitting was great but the store said I would have to go to a main dealer as they couldn't supply the rear blade. Told me I had ordered 2 x driver side as they are different lengths at the front. No warning about this on website - they refunded me for the rear blade. Will not use again.

title: Don't use Halfrauds for anything…
review: Don't use Halfrauds for anything cycling. Waste of time and the Chorley staff are time wasting morons. Edit: I took my E bike into the store at Chorley with a simple crank sensor warranty issue. A member of staff i believe called Micheal was very helpful and booked me in for the repair. A few days later I received a voicemail telling me the ONLY member off staff trained in warranty and e bike repair is off sick and no other MANAGER could deal with it until he returned. The staff need more training on E bikes as it appears more E bikes are sold than regular bikes. I now have an email with a cost of £25 for a warranty repair? Embarrassing from a leading brand.Booking number: 2226716446
